test: login-failure.spec.ts > login shows the dashboard after submit
error:

analysis.summary: Test expects #status to become "Dashboard loaded" after login submit, but it stays at "Login submitted" (form still visible, no navigation or status update occurs).
analysis.rootCause: Login submit handler (or subsequent redirect/dashboard render) is not implemented or is broken; the page only ever sets status to "Login submitted" and never reaches the dashboard state the test asserts.
analysis.suggestedFix: Implement the login success path so that a valid submit updates #status to "Dashboard loaded" (or navigates to the dashboard page) and update the test selector/timing if the final text differs.
